---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement for Helicon
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

A brief description of the feature.

## Motivation

What physics or use case does this enable? Why is it needed?

## Proposed Approach

How would you implement this? Include relevant equations, references, or pseudocode.

## Alternatives Considered

What other approaches did you consider? Why were they ruled out?

## Validation

How would we verify this feature works correctly? Include reference data, analytical solutions, or benchmarks.
